items.title: Quoting Daniel Jalkut
items.summary:
My take on AI is, essentially, everybody who’s against it is too against it and everybody who’s for it is too for it.
— Daniel Jalkut, via John Gruber

    Tags: ai

items.title: How the Pope’s Magnifica Humanitas offers a template for individuals to meet the AI moment
items.summary: Pope Leo XIV’s new encyclical on artificial intelligence includes a statement that warrants serious attention from technologists and policymakers: “Technology is never neutral.” Magnifica Humanitas (“Magnificent Humanity”) is a clarion call to all people to act with courage and solidarity as we enter an age already being transformed by artificial intelligence, the greatest change in…
